description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, angular form and a mix of rough and slightly smoother surfaces. Its coloration is predominantly a warm reddish-brown, interspersed with darker brown and black patches, and subtle hints of green and blue mineralization on one side. The rock's surface is highly textured, with visible crevices, jagged edges, and natural weathering patterns that suggest exposure to the elements. Some faces are more planar, while others are deeply pitted and uneven, giving the rock a natural, unrefined appearance. The overall mass and density suggest it is composed mainly of solid stone, likely sandstone or a similar sedimentary rock. This type of rock could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rugged, reddish-brown rock with jagged edges, dark patches, and hints of green-blue mineralization, featuring a highly textured, weathered surface.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's broadest face, with prominent reddish-brown coloration, dark patches, and visible angular crevices.
description_view_1: This side reveals a lighter, more uniform surface with subtle pitting and less pronounced color variation.
description_view_2: This angle highlights a striking dark brown area with green and blue mineral streaks, and a smoother, more planar section.
description_view_3: This view displays a mostly pale, rough surface with minimal color variation and a more blocky, less detailed appearance.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside barrier
